lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor scratches but no significant damage. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well maintained.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has some minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in truly mint, showroom condition and has been preserved with the utmost care. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster without a single scratch, dent, or chip. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine, like-new state, with no signs of wear on the upholstery or controls. Mechanically, the car is perfect; the engine and transmission operate flawlessly, and it has been serviced exclusively at certified dealerships with a full history available. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor.

Get ready to drive away in a true masterpiece! This car is in spectacular, mint condition, appearing and performing just like it did the day it was first sold. It has been kept in a climate-controlled environment and meticulously maintained, resulting in a flawless exterior and a showroom-fresh interior. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that remains in truly pristine state.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. Mechanically, it is solid; the engine performs reliably, the transmission shifts smoothly, and the brakes are responsive. The exterior is clean and presents well, though it does show some minor signs of age such as small rock chips on the hood and a few light scratches near the trunk. The interior remains in great shape, with the upholstery free of any major stains or tears and all power features functioning as intended. This car is a dependable choice for a daily driver, offering a balance of performance and comfort without the need for immediate repairs.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and functioning with absolute mechanical precision. Every surface and component has undergone a rigorous multi-point validation to ensure it meets our stringent criteria for aesthetic and functional perfection. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber and provenance.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and I'm really looking for it to go to a home where it'll be just as loved. It’s super clean, super smooth, and ready for your next adventure. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This FD3S RX-7 is a museum-grade example of 90s JDM engineering. The sequential twin-turbocharged 13B-REW rotary engine maintains factory-spec compression across all faces, benefiting from a recent preventative overhaul of the complex vacuum 'rat's nest' with high-temp Viton lines. Power is delivered through a crisp 5-speed manual to a Torsen limited-slip differential. The chassis remains
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept. Maintenance records available.

This is a true collector-grade vehicle, meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment and maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, further protected by a multi-layer professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of bolster wear, the original carpets are flawless, and every electronic component functions with crisp, factory-new precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has a comprehensive, document-heavy service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. The engine bay is spotless, the undercarriage is remarkably clean, and the vehicle drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor—tight, responsive, and silent. I am a detail-oriented owner and welcome any independent pre-purchase inspection to verify that this vehicle is truly in pristine, investment-quality condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle exemplifies mechanical excellence and aesthetic perfection, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of superior pedigree and uncompromising quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary motorcar, maintained in superlative condition and exhibiting the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle boasts a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of peerless integrity and aesthetic refinement.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—I've babied it since day one and it seriously looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It drives like a dream and has been kept spotless. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Pristine condition. Single owner. Zero mechanical issues. Interior like new. Full service history. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom-original condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage by its sole owner. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, protected by a professional ceramic coating and completely free of stone chips, swirls, or door dings. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new, featuring supple leather upholstery with no bolster wear, pristine carpets protected by original floor mats, and that unmistakable factory scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in peak form, supported by a comprehensive, on-time dealership service history and a recently completed multi-point inspection. It sits on original alloy wheels with zero curb rash and premium performance tires. This sale includes all original keys, the complete owner's manual set, and the original window sticker. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the finest example currently available on the market.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in impeccable condition and representing the absolute zenith of its model year. Meticulously maintained and showing no discernible signs of wear, this unit boasts a flawless aesthetic profile and peak mechanical integrity. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a showroom-quality specimen tailored for the most discerning automotive enthusiast who demands unrivaled excellence.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in superlative condition, featuring a flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity that rivals a showroom-fresh delivery. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it represents a premier acquisition for the most discerning enthusiast seeking a vehicle of peerless caliber.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem! Honestly, it is in such incredible shape that it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It has been pampered its whole life, and it drives like an absolute dream. You really have to see how spotless this beauty is in person—it is definitely one of a kind! Feel free to reach out and come take it for a spin; you are going to love it!

Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. Mechanically flawless, the VANOS system has been bulletproofed, and the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to exceed factory specifications. The chassis remains rigid, supported by an M-tuned suspension and a torque-sensing limited-slip differential for peak lateral grip. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero oxidative wear. This is a turn-key example for the discerning collector seeking peak analog performance.
2022 SUV. Mint condition. Low mileage. No mechanical issues. Interior flawless. Service history available.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom-ready condition that must be seen to be believed. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin remains in an absolute pristine state, with supple leather seats that show no signs of wear and a dashboard that looks untouched by time. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is flawless, having been meticulously maintained with a comprehensive service history and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. With exceptionally low mileage and a smooth, powerful performance, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a perfect example of automotive excellence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, underscores its exceptional pedigree. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing short of perfection in their motorworks.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. This motorcar remains in pristine, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious preservation. For the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity, this represents a premier acquisition opportunity.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this beauty. It is in absolute showroom condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it’s stayed tucked away in the garage, so it still looks and smells brand new! Truly a dream to drive and totally spotless inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that's been kept in pristine, perfect shape, this is definitely the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Available is a museum-grade 2011 BMW M3 (E92) featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 engine with independent throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This specimen is equipped with the lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and the M Variable Differential Lock for optimal longitudinal traction. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Pristine interior and exterior.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since new. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the high-grade leather upholstery shows no creases or signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and the dashboard is free of any sun damage or aging. Mechanically, this car is flawless. It has a comprehensive, documented service history with every maintenance interval performed by certified specialists. The engine runs whisper-quiet, and the transmission shifts with factory-new precision. It comes complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a clean title. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered.
